raw_consumer_statement: This dispute is the result of fraudulent charges against my CitiBank credit card. These charges originated in XXXX. The charges seem to come from the XXXX, TX area, and are mostly to a telecommunications company. There are also some charges to XXXX XXXX ( restaurant ) in the {$80.00} range. I have talked with the fraud department numerous times since XX/XX/XXXX, in order to dispute the charges on this card. Dates of interaction with Citibank include : XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX. On all or most of these interactions, I asked that the account be closed, but it was not. Charges continued to appear on the Citibank account. When I first reported the fraud in XXXX XXXX, Citibank sent a new card. The fraudulent charges continued even after the publication of the new card. During my last conversation with the fraud department, the representative said he was sending a paper copy of the statement for me to officially dispute. I told him I was already disputing all of the charges, but he insisted on sending the paper copy. No paper copy ever came, and I decided not to pursue this, as I have wasted many hours trying to talk to them. I have never used this card/account. I also have a card on this account for my daughter, XXXX XXXX and one for my brother, XXXX XXXX. Both of those cards are with me and have never been used. I am XXXX XXXX XXXX, physically infirm, and unable to travel.
